glosses.ja: 倍にする; 追い越す

sentences.target: Je double cette voiture au prochain feu.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dubl sɛt vwatyʁ o pʁɔʃɛ̃ fø/

translations.fr: Je double cette voiture au prochain feu.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dubl sɛt vwatyʁ o pʁɔʃɛ̃ fø/
translations.en: I'm passing that car at the next light.
translations.es: Voy a adelantar ese coche en el próximo semáforo.
translations.de: Ich überhole dieses Auto an der nächsten Ampel.
translations.it: Sorpasso quella macchina al prossimo semaforo.
translations.ko: 다음 신호에서 저 차를 추월할 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我要在下一个红绿灯超过那辆车。
translations.yue: 我會喺下一個紅綠燈超嗰架車。
translations.ru: Я обгоню эту машину на следующем светофоре.
translations.pt: Vou ultrapassar aquele carro no próximo semáforo.
translations.he: אני אעקוף את המכונית הזאת ברמזור הבא.
translations.tr: Bir sonraki ışıkta o arabayı sollayacağım.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ vượt chiếc xe đó ở đèn giao thông tiếp theo.
translations.ar: سأتجاوز تلك السيارة عند الإشارة التالية.
translations.nl: Ik haal die auto in bij het volgende stoplicht.
translations.uk: Я обжену ту машину на наступному світлофорі.
translations.hu: A következő lámpánál megelőzöm azt az autót.
translations.hi: मैं अगले सिग्नल पर उस गाड़ी को ओवरटेक करूँगा.
translations.pl: Wyprzedzę tamten samochód na następnych światłach.
translations.el: Θα προσπεράσω εκείνο το αυτοκίνητο στο επόμενο φανάρι.
translations.nb: Jeg skal kjøre forbi den bilen ved neste lyskryss.
translations.id: Saya akan menyalip mobil itu di lampu merah berikutnya.
translations.sv: Jag ska köra om den bilen vid nästa trafikljus.
translations.ro: Voi depăși mașina aceea la următorul semafor.
translations.cs: Předjedu to auto na příštím semaforu.
translations.da: Jeg vil overhale den bil ved næste lyskryds.
translations.ja: 次の信号であの車を追い越す。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; the syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; here means ‘to pass/overtake (a vehicle)’, taking a direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying ‘voiture’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘double’ (the vehicle being overtaken).
Preposition ‘à’ contracted with the definite article ‘le’ (à + le → au); introduces a locative complement.
Adjective, masculine singular, modifying ‘feu’ (‘next’).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’, here meaning a traffic light.

sentences.target: On doit doubler la quantité de pâte.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa duble la kɑ̃tite də pɑt/

translations.fr: On doit doubler la quantité de pâte.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa duble la kɑ̃tite də pɑt/
translations.en: We need to double the amount of dough.
translations.es: Tenemos que duplicar la cantidad de masa.
translations.it: Dobbiamo raddoppiare la quantità di impasto.
translations.ko: 반죽의 양을 두 배로 늘려야 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得把面团的量加倍。
translations.yue: 我哋要將麵糰嘅份量加倍。
translations.pt: Precisamos dobrar a quantidade de massa.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים להכפיל את כמות הבצק.
translations.tr: Hamurun miktarını iki katına çıkarmamız gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần tăng gấp đôi lượng bột.
translations.nl: We moeten de hoeveelheid deeg verdubbelen.
translations.hu: Meg kell dupláznunk a tészta mennyiségét.
translations.hi: हमें आटे की मात्रा दोगुनी करनी है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να διπλασιάσουμε την ποσότητα της ζύμης.
translations.ro: Trebuie să dublăm cantitatea de aluat.
translations.da: Vi skal fordoble mængden af dej.
translations.ja: 生地の量を倍にする必要がある。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; colloquially equivalent to ‘we’.
Modal verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; marks obligation, taking an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb complement of ‘doit’; here means ‘to increase to twice’. Direct object: ‘la quantité’.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘quantité’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘doubler’.
Preposition introducing a complement specifying what the quantity pertains to.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition ‘de’.

translations.es: Te estás colando en la fila.
translations.nl: Je dringt voor in de rij.
translations.sv: Du tränger dig före i kön.
translations.ro: Te bagi în față la coadă.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; here in the sense of ‘to form a second line / overtake a queue’, with a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘file’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘doubles’ (the queue/line being doubled).

sentences.target: Ils doublent ce film en français.

translations.fr: Ils doublent ce film en français.
translations.en: They're dubbing this movie in French.
translations.es: Están doblando esta película al francés.
translations.de: Sie synchronisieren diesen Film auf Französisch.
translations.it: Stanno doppiando questo film in francese.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在把这部电影配成法语。
translations.yue: 佢哋正喺度將呢套戲配音成法文。
translations.ru: Они дублируют этот фильм на французский.
translations.pt: Eles estão dublando este filme em francês.
translations.he: הם מדבבים את הסרט הזה לצרפתית.
translations.vi: Họ đang lồng tiếng bộ phim này sang tiếng Pháp.
translations.ar: إنهم يدبلجون هذا الفيلم إلى الفرنسية.
translations.nl: Ze dubben deze film in het Frans.
translations.hi: वे इस फ़िल्म को फ़्रेंच में डब कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μεταγλωτίζουν αυτή την ταινία στα γαλλικά.
translations.nb: De dubber denne filmen til fransk.
translations.id: Mereka sedang mendubbing film ini ke bahasa Prancis.
translations.sv: De dubbar den här filmen till franska.
translations.ro: Ei dublează acest film în franceză.
translations.da: De dubber denne film til fransk.
translations.ja: この映画をフランス語に吹き替えている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural, masculine (mixed gender possible).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; here means ‘to dub (a film)’, taking a direct object and a language complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, introducing ‘film’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘doublent’.
Preposition marking the language into which the film is dubbed.
Common noun referring to the French language; object of the preposition ‘en’.
